LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-18-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JACK WONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Motion To Set Aside The Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JACK WONG's Motion To Set Aside The Entry Of Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "motion to vacate judgment" is granted. Counsel's affidavit adequately attests to his mistake/inadvertence/neglect. Defendant may seek CCP 473(b) and 473(c)(1) penalties by regular noticed motion.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
